title: Data & Insights for Business Decisions
source: Authored for the Salareen corporate catalog; structured to mirror the UK apprenticeship standard format.

knowledge.K1: How data supports better business decisions.
knowledge.K2: Types and sources of business data and basic data literacy.
knowledge.K3: How to gather and organise data in spreadsheets and simple databases.
knowledge.K4: Basic data cleaning and quality checks.
knowledge.K5: Summarising data with totals, averages and percentages.
knowledge.K6: Reading and choosing simple charts appropriately.
knowledge.K8: Common pitfalls and misleading data presentations.
knowledge.K9: Turning a finding into a clear, actionable recommendation.
knowledge.K10: Data-protection basics and handling data responsibly.
knowledge.K11: How to present findings to non-technical colleagues.
knowledge.K12: Tools commonly used for everyday data work.

skills.S1: Identify the decision a piece of analysis should support.
skills.S3: Clean and check data for basic quality issues.
skills.S8: Draft a clear recommendation from a finding.
skills.S9: Build a simple dashboard or report.
skills.S10: Handle data securely and follow policy.
skills.S11: Present results clearly to a non-technical audience.

behaviours.B1: Curious about what data can reveal.
behaviours.B4: Acts responsibly with data and privacy.
behaviours.B5: Willing to learn new tools and methods.

Duty 1.statement: Identify the decision and the data needed.

Duty 2.statement: Gather, organise and clean business data.

Duty 6.statement: Handle data responsibly using appropriate tools.
